# ALLIN

> India's premier institute for accounting and finance. ALLIN connects Indian students to worldwide finance careers through global credentials (ACCA, CA, EA, IFRS), a School Strengthening Program (SSP) for grades 6–12, and job-ready skill courses, all backed by Big-4 mentors, real internships and committed placement support.

ALLIN (also "ALLIN EdTech") teaches through a five-stage roadmap: counselling & pathway, concept mastery, implementation & internship, A3 mentorship, and network & placement. Content is delivered via live and recorded classes by CA rank-holders and Big-4 trained faculty.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://allinedtech.com/): Overview, the ALLIN roadmap, programs and mentors.
- [About](https://allinedtech.com/about.html): Mission, faculty and the KICN teaching method.
- [School (SSP)](https://allinedtech.com/school.html): School Strengthening Program for grades 6–12.
- [Skill Courses](https://allinedtech.com/skills.html): Job-ready finance and professional tracks.
- [College Collaborations](https://allinedtech.com/college.html): Institutional tie-ups.
- [Contact](https://allinedtech.com/contact.html): Enquiry form and direct contact.

## Global credentials (Skill Courses)
- [ACCA](https://allinedtech.com/courses/acca.html): Chartered Certified Accountant qualification.
- [CA](https://allinedtech.com/courses/ca.html): Chartered Accountancy.
- [EA / TAP](https://allinedtech.com/courses/ea-tap.html): US Enrolled Agent & Tax Accounting Program.
- [IFRS](https://allinedtech.com/courses/ifrs.html): International Financial Reporting Standards.
- [Financial Literacy](https://allinedtech.com/courses/financial-literacy.html): Foundations of personal & business finance.

## School programs (SSP)
- [CA Foundation](https://allinedtech.com/programs/ca-foundation.html)
- [JEE Foundation](https://allinedtech.com/programs/jee.html) · [JEE Advanced](https://allinedtech.com/programs/jee-advanced.html)
- [NEET](https://allinedtech.com/programs/neet.html) · [CUET](https://allinedtech.com/programs/cuet.html) · [CLAT](https://allinedtech.com/programs/clat.html) · [IPMAT](https://allinedtech.com/programs/ipmat.html)
- [Career Guidance](https://allinedtech.com/programs/career-guidance.html) · [Mindset](https://allinedtech.com/programs/mindset.html) · [Psychology](https://allinedtech.com/programs/psychology.html)
- [Entrepreneurship](https://allinedtech.com/programs/entrepreneurship.html) · [Financial Literacy](https://allinedtech.com/programs/financial-literacy.html) · [AI](https://allinedtech.com/programs/ai.html)
